title: Location Areas, Encounter Relations, Filtering, and Exploration
description: Explore confuses locations with location areas, requests unbounded encounter data, prints duplicates, ignores empty relations, and loses which area produced each Pokemon. Learners cumulatively produce provenance-preserving location encounter explorer through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Distinguish region, location, and location-area resources and map the command to the endpoint whose relation answers the user need.
Validate numeric or canonical area identity, retain requested and resolved values, and construct only fixed-origin resource paths.
Deduplicate Pokemon by stable identity while retaining area, version, method, chance, or condition provenance needed by the view.
